_meta.purpose: Synthetic in-repo CI fixture for the issue-#28 line-level deterministic eval. NO real client/vendor/firm data — fictional vendors and values only.
_meta.scored_dimensions: per-line tax treatment, COA code, direction (ADR-0026 §5 field-match, not LLM-as-judge)
_meta.erp_codes_note: erp_codes values here are the CANONICAL tax_treatment, matching how live export rows are tagged. The real per-ERP code strings (SV-8, etc.) are a separate deterministic engine mapping and are scored against the real golden referenced via LEDGR_GOLDEN_MANIFEST.
_meta.anti_false_green: telco-line-level-dec2025.pdf authors ZR; a ZR→ES miscode reconciles (gst=0) but must FAIL this eval.

alpha-line-level-dec2025.pdf.note: 2 separate MY invoices in 1 PDF (fan-out); distinct source_doc_id per logical doc

telco-line-level-dec2025.pdf.note: SG telco purchase; zero-rated line — anti-false-green anchor (ZR not ES)
